ERRORS.VERIFY_ERROR: Unable to verify invitation. Please try again later.

LOADING.TITLE: Completing registration...
LOADING.MESSAGE: We are verifying your invitation token.

INVALID.TITLE: Invalid invitation
INVALID.MESSAGE: This invitation token is not valid or has expired. Please contact your administrator for a new invitation.

PAGE.TITLE: Login to your account
PAGE.SUBTITLE: Enter your email below to login to your account.

BLOCKED_ACCOUNT.TITLE: Your sign-in was blocked
BLOCKED_ACCOUNT.MESSAGE: Your account has been blocked after multiple consecutive login attempts.
BLOCKED_ACCOUNT.EMAIL_SENT: We've sent you a notification via email with instructions on how to unblock it.

INACTIVE_ACCOUNT.TITLE: Account Inactive
INACTIVE_ACCOUNT.MESSAGE: Your account is currently inactive and you cannot log in at this time.
INACTIVE_ACCOUNT.CONTACT_ADMIN: Please contact your administrator to reactivate your account.

RESET_PASSWORD.TITLE: Reset your password
RESET_PASSWORD.SUBTITLE: Type your email address to send instructions to reset your password to you inbox.

ERRORS.EMAIL_NOT_FOUND: This email does not exist in our database.

CHECK_INBOX.TITLE: Check your inbox
CHECK_INBOX.MESSAGE: We've sent you an email to [email]. Follow the instructions to access your account.

SEARCH.PLACEHOLDER: Search by first name, last name or email

TOOLTIPS.REGISTRATION: Shows if the member has completed the email invitation, is still pending confirmation or has expired.
TOOLTIPS.ACTIVE: Indicates whether the member's account is currently active or deactivated without being removed from the database.

TABLE.NO_RESULTS: No members match the current filters.
TABLE.EMPTY_DESCRIPTION: You don't have any members matching the selected filters.
TABLE.NO_INACTIVE_MEMBERS_DESCRIPTION: You don't have any inactive members.

MEMBER_CREATED.TITLE: Member created successfully!
MEMBER_CREATED.DESCRIPTION: {{name}} has received a link to access the platform.

MEMBER_DEACTIVATED.TITLE: Member deactivated successfully!
MEMBER_DEACTIVATED.DESCRIPTION: {{name}}'s account has been deactivated. The user no longer has access to the platform.

MEMBER_REACTIVATED.TITLE: Member reactivated successfully!
MEMBER_REACTIVATED.DESCRIPTION: {{name}} has been reactivated. The user now has access to the platform.

EMAIL.HELPER_TEXT: This email address cannot be modified once the account is created.

THEME.LABEL: Theme
THEME.DESCRIPTION: Select the theme for the tool.

PDF_SIGNATURE.LABEL: PDF Signature
PDF_SIGNATURE.UPLOAD_INSTRUCTIONS: Click to upload your signature or drag and drop
PDF_SIGNATURE.REQUIREMENTS: Recommended ratio 21:9. Supported types: SVG, PNG or JPG. Max file size: 4MB

ERRORS.FILE_TOO_LARGE: File is too large. Max size is 4MB.

REMOVE_DIALOG.DESCRIPTION: You're about to delete the organization's signature. This action is irreversible. Once deleted, it will be permanently removed.

ERRORS.INVALID_TYPE: File type not supported. Use SVG, PNG or JPG.

LANGUAGE.LABEL: Language
